verse.name: V1
verse.lines: When I think of all the Lord has done for me, Fully prevailed so I could walk in victory; Since I've touched the cross and felt the pain He bore, Forsaking all my life before, I've set out for Heaven's shore; To go with Him all the way, Never to return again to yesterday.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I can't turn back on Him, I've turned away from sin; I'll walk with Him everyday, There's just no other way, While bridges behind me burn, Pressing ahead will be my yearn. I've reached the point of no return.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Having put my hand to the plow, I won't look back, Nothing behind could ever match what I now have; The Savior now that I have come to know, Has everything I need to grow, to whom shall we go? Don't ever wanna part, 'Cause it's true that Jesus, He has won my heart.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: For rich or for poor, In sickness and in health, For better, for worse, Lord, I give You all myself. To have and to hold, To cherish in my heart, A vow, even death can never part.
